Package org.apache.juneau.rest.mock

Class MockRestClient.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.MockRestClient.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
BeanStoreOverridable<MockRestClient.Builder>
Enclosing class:
MockRestClient
public static final class MockRestClient.Builder extends Object implements BeanStoreOverridable<MockRestClient.Builder>
Fluent builder for MockRestClient.
Since:
9.2.1

  • Method Details

    • contextPath

      public MockRestClient.Builder contextPath(String value)
      Sets the servlet context path (e.g. "/myapp").
      Parameters:
      value - The context path. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • overridingBeanStore

      public MockRestClient.Builder overridingBeanStore(BeanStore value)
      Installs a BeanStore as the overridingParent of the RestContext's bean store, so test-time overrides (e.g. TestBeanStore) resolve at tier 1 of the lookup chain — above the resource's local @Bean factory entries.

      Setting this disables the per-resource RestContext cache for the duration of this build, so the overlay is not silently shared with a previously-cached instance.

      Example:

      var overlay = new TestBeanStore().override(MyService.class, mockSvc); try (client = MockRestClient.builder(MyResource.class) .overridingBeanStore(overlay) .build()) { client.get("/widgets/1").run().assertStatus().is(200); }

      Specified by:
      overridingBeanStore in interface BeanStoreOverridable<MockRestClient.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The override layer. Can be null to clear a previously-set value.
      Returns:
      This object.
      Since:
      10.0.0

    • defaultParser

      public MockRestClient.Builder defaultParser(Parser value)
      Sets an explicit default parser used when the response Content-Type matches no registered parser.

      Setting this also causes the client to advertise the parser's media types in the Accept header, so the server must be able to produce that content type. Omit this (the default) when the target resource does not have a JSON serializer configured.

      Example:

      try (client = MockRestClient.builder(MyJsonResource.class) .defaultParser(JsonParser.DEFAULT) .build()) { var api = client.getClient().remote(MyApi.class); api.someMethod(); }

      Parameters:
      value - The parser. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • build

      public MockRestClient build()
      Builds and returns the MockRestClient.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.
